scenario: DPA references SCC 2010 module. Parent MSA Section 12.4 references SCC 2021 module. Internal contract conflict.

documents.soc2:
SOC 2 Type II Report — ConflictCorp
Audit period: 2024-01 to 2024-12
Trust Services Criteria: Security, Availability, Confidentiality
Opinion: Unqualified. No exceptions noted.
Auditor: Independent CPA firm.
documents.iso27001:
ISO/IEC 27001 Certificate — ConflictCorp
Valid through: 2027-06-01
Scope: Information security management for production services.
documents.dpa:
Data Processing Agreement — ConflictCorp
Governing SCC module: 2010 (Module 2: Controller → Processor)
Subject matter: provision of contracted services.
Subprocessor approval: prior written approval required (Art. 28(2)).
Note: This DPA references SCC 2010 Module 2. The parent MSA (Section 12.4) references SCC 2021. Where these conflict the DPA controls.
documents.msa:
Master Service Agreement — ConflictCorp
Section 12.4: All cross-border transfers governed by EU SCC module 2021.

Subprocessor list:
  - AWS Inc.
  - Datadog Inc.
documents.questionnaire:
Security Questionnaire (SIG Lite) — ConflictCorp
Encryption: Encryption in transit (TLS 1.3) and at rest (AES-256).
MFA: Required for all customer-facing access.
Breach notification: 72 hours.
documents.package_summary: Vendor package summary: Conflicting SCC references between DPA and MSA.
